text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hm, guess the Emperor's out.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you're looking for the president, she's away
conducting some student council affairs. Would
you like me to take a message?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
No need. It's nothing important. I just thought of
something better.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: You're pretty much her right hand, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting to get to know what sort of
individual the Emperor keeps by her side.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...What are you getting at?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: How about we have a little fun?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
A race, or anything else of your choosing. Let me
get a look at your competitive side.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you for the invitation. Unfortunately, I
can't accept a challenge which might be mistaken
for a personal conflict.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Students of our status must serve as examples to
the younger ones. I would compete with you, but
only under the appropriate conditions.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hah! Don't be a bore. I'm just trying to have a
little fun. No need to make it a big deal.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Or are you trying to run away? At the end of the
day, you're just one of her flunkies. Can't do
anything without her approval, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now you're looking down on me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I know better to not be easily provoked. Also,
you're misunderstanding something here.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: In a proper setting, I, the Empress, would be more than happy to take on a challenge from anybody.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Whether it be the great star above long engraved
into my memory...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Or the very Emperor who reigns here on earth.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hah! You're just a puppet, aren't you? Fine, then.
Can't say I'm not curious.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Face me on the turf someday. Be on your best
game, no holds barred.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Gladly.
